entries.prompt:
Generate a 3x3 sprite sheet (square cells, identical size) of the same character, all on a SOLID #00FF00 green background. Match the LAYOUT and FRAMING of the attached reference image exactly. The reference shows the structural template only — DO NOT copy the reference character's weapons, spells, equipment, or actions. Use the new character's own actions (described below) instead.

  Row 1: Portrait / South idle / East side-profile idle
  Row 2: East attack (lunging forward with bared fangs and outstretched claws, no held weapon) / East spell (exhaling a wide pale-blue frost cone from the mouth, ice crystals forming mid-air) / East block (rearing back with wings flared like a natural shield, head low, no held shield)
  Row 3: East knocked out (lying down) / East cheering / East wounded

Character: A young frost dragon. Its dragon-breath freezes foes in place. Dragon-scales shimmer blue.
EQUIPMENT (HARD RULE): this is a BEAST / DRAGON / NON-HUMANOID. DO NOT add a shield. DO NOT add a sword, axe, staff, wand, or any held weapon. The creature uses its own body — claws, fangs, wings, tail, magical breath, elemental aura — for every pose. Spells manifest as glow / breath / particles around the head or mouth, not from a wand or staff. Block uses the body itself (rearing back, wing-shield, etc.), never a held shield.

Use a clean 16-bit JRPG pixel-art style with rich color palette, sharp outlines, no halo/glow into the green, no text, no labels, no UI. Each pose centered in its cell. Background must be exactly #00FF00 with no shading or gradient.
